title: pilosella sphaerocephala subsp. brevifurca
intro: Pilosella sphaerocephala subsp. brevifurca, also known as a subspecies of the false oxeye daisy, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which are thought to have potential health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving digestive health. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential interactions with medications and allergies. While more research is needed to fully understand the effects of Pilosella sphaerocephala subsp. brevifurca, it has been traditionally used to support overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
